Our Story

Functional Luxury,
Underfoot

Charmain transforms homes and businesses with stylish, sustainable vinyl flooring solutions, setting new standards in quality and design. Committed to eco-friendly practices, we prioritize exceptional design and customer satisfaction while offering a diverse range of styles. Looking ahead, Charmain will invest in research and development to stay at the forefront of trends, empowering customers with knowledge to create beautiful, functional, and sustainable spaces. Our mission is to create inspiring environments — one vinyl floor at a time.

Waterproof100% waterproof core
Scratch ResistantHeavy duty wear layer
Easy InstallGlue-down system, 2m wide × 25m long
Premium DesignWood, stone, marble & custom patterns
